title: Field Achievement Award
content:

{{Quote|They gave me a medal when we got back—the Field Achievement Award, the one they give all the field operatives who make it back from their first mission. I still have it. I threw it in a drawer and haven't looked at it since.|Aurin Leith|<ref name="DNH" />}}
The '''Field Achievement Award''' was a medal given to [[Alliance to Restore the Republic/Legends|Rebel Alliance]] [[operative]]s who survived their first mission during the [[Galactic Civil War/Legends|Galactic Civil War]]. Alliance [[Doctor/Legends|Doctor]] [[Aurin Leith]] received the Field Achievement Award after completing her first field operation, a [[Mission to Selnesh|rescue mission]] to an [[Selnesh Imperial Detention Center|Imperial detention center]]. However, Leith [[Death/Legends|killed]] an [[Galactic Empire/Legends|Imperial]] [[Stormtrooper/Legends|stormtrooper]] during the mission and subsequently kept her Field Achievement Award hidden in a drawer, not wanting to be reminded that she took the life of another [[Sentience/Legends|sentient]].

==Description==
The Field Achievement Award was a medal bestowed upon all [[Alliance to Restore the Republic/Legends|Alliance to Restore the Republic]] field [[operative]]s who survived their first mission during the [[Galactic Civil War/Legends|Galactic Civil War]] against the [[Galactic Empire/Legends|Galactic Empire]].<ref name="DNH" />

==History==
[[File:Aurin_Leith_AJ10.jpg|thumb|right|150px|Aurin Leith, recipient of the Field Achievement Award]]
During the war, [[Aurin Leith]], a [[Hospital ship/Legends|hospital ship]] [[Doctor/Legends|doctor]] in the [[Alliance Army/Legends|Alliance Army]], was temporarily detached from her assignment to serve as a [[Medic/Legends|medic]] for a [[Alliance Special Forces/Legends|commando]] team during a [[Mission to Selnesh|mission]] to rescue a [[Prisoner/Legends|captured]] [[Gebnerret Vibrion|Alliance leader]] held in an [[Selnesh Imperial Detention Center|Imperial detention center]]. Although the mission was a success, Leith was forced to [[Death/Legends|kill]] an enemy [[Stormtrooper/Legends|stormtrooper]] during the team's escape from the [[Prison/Legends|prison]].<ref name="DNH" />

Leith, having made a medical oath to never harm a fellow [[Sentience/Legends|sentient]], was deeply disturbed that she killed another being, even if it had been an enemy combatant. Following the completion of the mission, Leith received the Field Achievement Award for surviving her first field operation. However, she regarded her medal as a reminder that she took another being's life and kept it hidden in a drawer, never to look at the award again.<ref name="DNH" />

==Behind the scenes==
The Field Achievement Award was mentioned in the short story "[[Do No Harm]]," written by [[Erin Endom]] and first published by [[West End Games]] for [[Star Wars Adventure Journal 10|''Star Wars Adventure Journal'' 10]] in [[May]] [[1996]].<ref name="DNH" />

==Appearances==
